com.newland.nsdk.core.api.internal

Interface NSDKModuleManager


  • public interface NSDKModuleManager
    Main entrance of NSDK(Newland Software Development Kit). Provides the ability to get all the internal device modules.

    For internal modules, follow below steps to develop:

         // 1. Get the instance of the module manager.
     NSDKModuleManager moduleManager = NSDKModuleManagerImpl.getInstance();
     //If you want to obtain the overall debug information, please call the following two interfaces.
     moduleManager.setDebugMode(LogLevel.VERBOSE);
     moduleManager.setNativeDebugMode(NativeDebugLevel.ALL_ON);

     // 2. Initialize device modules.
     try {
         moduleManager.init(context);
     } catch(NSDKException e) {
         // Handle the exception.
     }

    // 3. Get the specified device module.
    Beeper beeper = (Beeper)moduleManager.getModule(ModuleType.BEEPER);

    // 4. Invoke methods of the device module.
    try {
        // Beep for 3 seconds with frequency 1000hz.
        beeper.beep(1000, 3000);
    } catch (NSDKException e) {
        // Handle the exception.
    }

     // 5. Release NSDK resources.
     moduleManager.destroy();

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void destroy()
      Releases device resources.
      void enableNativeLog(boolean isEnable)
      Deprecated. 
      Replaced by setNativeDebugMode(NativeDebugLevel).
      java.lang.String getErrMsg(int errCode)
      Get Error Message by its ErrorCode
      Module getModule(java.lang.String moduleName)
      Gets the device module according to the module name.
      void init(Context context)
      Initializes internal device modules.
      void setDebugMode(LogLevel level)
      Sets debug level.
      void setNativeDebugMode(NativeDebugLevel nativeDebugLevel)
      Sets whether to open native NSDK or Driver log.

    • Method Detail

      • init

        void init(Context context)
   throws NSDKException
        Initializes internal device modules.
          Note:
        • This shall be called before getting any internal device modules.
        • ErrorCode.NEED_UPDATE will be thrown if it needs firmware update.
        Parameters:
        context - [Required] The context for device modules to use.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getModule

        Module getModule(java.lang.String moduleName)
        Gets the device module according to the module name.
        Parameters:
        moduleName - [Required] The name of the device module. See ModuleType.
        Returns:
        The required device module.

      • destroy

        void destroy()
        Releases device resources.

      • setDebugMode

        void setDebugMode(LogLevel level)
        Sets debug level.

        Note: This is called to set the log level of the Java. If you want to obtain more driver information, please call setNativeDebugMode(NativeDebugLevel).

        Parameters:
        level - [Required] Debug level, see LogLevel. Default log level is LogLevel.OFF.

      • enableNativeLog

        void enableNativeLog(boolean isEnable)
        Deprecated. Replaced by setNativeDebugMode(NativeDebugLevel).
        Sets whether to open native log.
        Parameters:
        isEnable - Whether to open native log.

      • setNativeDebugMode

        void setNativeDebugMode(NativeDebugLevel nativeDebugLevel)
                 throws NSDKException
        Sets whether to open native NSDK or Driver log.
        Parameters:
        nativeDebugLevel - [Required] Native Debug Level, seeNativeDebugLevel.
        Throws:
        NSDKException

      • getErrMsg

        java.lang.String getErrMsg(int errCode)
        Get Error Message by its ErrorCode
        Parameters:
        errCode - [Required]
        Returns:
        Error Message according to errCode
